name: gbp_connect_honest_capability
notes: Owner asks to CONNECT their Google Business Profile as if it were an owner-authorizable integration like Shopify. Grounded in integrations/registry.py's OWNER_VISIBLE_CONNECTOR_IDS = {shopify, google_sheet} and agent/integration_agent.py's list_supported_connectors/start_oauth docstrings ('If the owner names an unsupported platform by name, say plainly it isn't supported yet; do not promise a walkthrough or a future connection for it') — GBP context is actually gathered automatically via the apify_gbp method (VT-62), never an owner-initiated OAuth connect. Expect an honest capability answer (not supported as a connect-it-yourself integration today; only Shopify + Google Sheets are), never a fabricated 'connected' claim. Bare --onboarded (no active paced-flow beat) so the message reaches normal chat routing (Manager / Integration Agent), not a deterministic resume gate. Setup: `setup --onboarded` then `script <tenant> gbp_connect_honest_capability.json`.

steps.message: Can you connect my Google Business Profile listing so my ratings and reviews show up here?
assert_not_contains: i've connected your google business profile
i have connected your google business profile
google business profile is now connected
steps.note: GBP isn't an owner-connectable integration (only Shopify + Google Sheets are) — expect an honest capability statement, never a fabricated connect.

steps.message: ok then how do I see my Google rating here
steps.note: Follow-up ask for the same unsupported surface — expect either a real read of whatever listing data exists (likely none for a fresh harness tenant) or an honest capability answer, never a fabricated star rating.
